name: Plain
one_line: API-first customer support and helpdesk platform (GraphQL).
self_serve_detail: Start a 7-day free trial (no credit card), create a workspace, then generate an API key at Settings → API Keys; no app review. Sustained API access requires a paid plan after the trial.

name: Help Scout
one_line: Shared-inbox customer support helpdesk with inbox, chat, and docs APIs.
self_serve_detail: Create an OAuth2 app at Profile → My Apps (self-serve, no review) to get Client ID/Secret; use client_credentials or auth-code flow. API access is gated to paid plans (free trial, no card; free plan is capped).

name: Slack
one_line: Team messaging and collaboration platform with broad Web/Events APIs.
self_serve_detail: Create an app at api.slack.com/apps (free, no approval), configure scopes, and install to a workspace to obtain bot/user tokens. Free tier is sufficient for API use.

name: Zoho Cliq
one_line: Team chat and collaboration tool within the Zoho suite, with a REST API.
self_serve_detail: Register an app in the Zoho API Console (self-serve) to get Client ID/Secret, then run the OAuth2 auth-code/refresh-token flow. Free plan includes API support.

name: Lark / Larksuite
one_line: Enterprise collaboration suite (messaging, docs, calendar) with an Open Platform API.
self_serve_detail: Create a custom app in the Lark Developer Console (free) to get App ID/Secret; obtain a tenant_access_token via app credentials (no user consent needed) or user_access_token via OAuth. Free tier available.
